description_long: This is a small, round plastic container with a wide, shallow body and a tightly fitting, slightly domed white lid. The body of the container is dark, likely black or deep gray, and is wrapped with a colorful label featuring a yellow and white background with blue accents. The label displays a prominent blue oval logo with white text, as well as additional product information and graphics in blue and white. The lid appears to be made of a different, slightly translucent plastic and has a subtle ridged pattern around its edge for grip. The container is typical of those used for creams or lotions, designed to be portable and resealable. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with branding and product details clearly visible on the label.
description: A round, shallow plastic lotion container with a white domed lid and a colorful branded label wrapped around its dark body.
description_view_0: The front of the container shows the white lid and the main section of the label with a blue oval logo and yellow background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the label, showing more of the blue and white text and a partial logo.
description_view_2: The back side reveals additional product information in blue text on a white background, with less of the logo visible.
description_view_3: This angle shows the opposite side of the label, with the blue logo partially visible and more of the yellow and white design.
